_meta.description: English source strings for NST Retailer Onboarding V1. Used with next-intl. Source of truth — keep es.json keys in sync.
_meta.voice_notes: Friendly-professional, second-person ('you'). Short sentences. Avoid jargon. Never say 'bank' unless referring to the retailer's own bank account — this is all NST brand.

global.locked_banner: Your account is in setup mode. You'll get full portal access as soon as you finish these steps and your launch date is confirmed.

validation.address_invalid: We couldn't verify this address. Please double-check it.
validation.password_weak: Password must be at least 12 characters with an uppercase letter, a number, and a symbol

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: We couldn't connect. Check your internet connection.
errors.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

onboarding.welcome_title: Let's get your store set up.
onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Seven quick steps. You can save and come back anytime.
onboarding.all_done_subtitle: Your operations team will confirm your launch date shortly.

handoff.ready_sub: Your NST rep is lining up your launch date. Download a summary to keep for your records — it's the same doc ops uses to set up your store.

sync.synced: Synced with NST operations. Your rep has everything they need.
sync.failed: Some steps didn't reach our ops system. Your NST rep will reach out shortly.

home.title: NST Retailer Onboarding
home.subtitle: Your self-serve setup starts here. Claim your account to begin — most retailers finish in about 20 minutes.
home.body: We'll confirm your storefront details, collect banking info, and schedule your first pickup. You can save and come back anytime.
home.secure_note: All inputs are encrypted at rest. NST never stores full safe combinations.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: New to NST? Use the link in your welcome email to claim your account.

step_0_claim.title: Welcome to NST, {firstName}.
step_0_claim.subtitle: Your agreement is signed. Let's get your store set up.

step_1_profile.title: Tell us about your store.
step_1_profile.subtitle: This is what we print on manifests and what our drivers use to find you.

fields.access_notes: Notes for the driver (loading door, buzzer, entry code, parking)

step_2_safe.title: Tell us about your safe.
step_2_safe.subtitle: So our drivers know what to expect on site and who to ask for the key.

fields.has_smart_safe_question: Do you have a Smart Safe on site?
fields.storage_method_question: How is cash stored between pickups?
fields.safe_serial_photo: Photo of the serial plate (optional, reduces typos)
fields.dashboard_question: How does your safe dashboard connect?

provisional_options.want_to_set: Yes, I want to set it up

step_3_banking.title: Confirm your banking details.
step_3_banking.subtitle: We pulled these from the cash info form you signed. Review them before we connect everything.
step_3_banking.ocr_fail_banner: We couldn't read your form automatically. Please type the details from your signed cash info form.
step_3_banking.security_note: Banking details are encrypted at rest with AWS KMS and only the last 4 are ever shown back to you. Full numbers are read-only to the NST ops team.

step_4_deposit.title: Let's walk through a deposit.
step_4_deposit.subtitle: Before your first real pickup, our driver needs you to enter a deposit in the Cash Services Portal. Let's walk through the same form here so you know exactly what to do on day one. This is a sample — nothing is submitted live.
step_4_deposit.instructions_lead: Use these values for the sample:
step_4_deposit.math_error: Your breakdown adds up to {calculated} but the deposit total is {stated}. Fix one of them.
step_4_deposit.success: Got it. That's exactly how you'll do it before every pickup.

step_5_change_order.title: Now a change order.
step_5_change_order.subtitle: Same idea — let's walk through a change order. You'll use this when you need coin rolls or small bills.
step_5_change_order.instructions_lead: Use these values for the sample:

fields.delivery_date_hint: Pick any date at least 2 business days from today

step_5_change_order.date_error: Delivery date must be at least 2 business days from today.
step_5_change_order.success: Got it. That's how you'll request change from now on.

step_6_invoicing.title: Where should we send your invoices?
step_6_invoicing.subtitle: NST invoices weekly. Confirm the billing contact and we'll send a sample right now so you know what to expect.
step_6_invoicing.cadence_bullet_1: Invoices go out every Monday morning covering the prior week.
step_6_invoicing.cadence_bullet_2: Payment is due 15 days after invoice date (Net 15).
step_6_invoicing.cadence_bullet_3: We'll always send a PDF plus a line-item CSV.

fields.send_sample_checkbox: Email me a sample invoice now

step_6_invoicing.sent_message: Sample invoice on the way to {email}.
step_6_invoicing.sent_subcopy: Check your inbox in a minute or two. Hit continue when it arrives so we can lock in your launch date.
step_6_invoicing.bounce_error: Your email bounced. Please update the address and try again.
step_6_invoicing.last_sent_bounced: Last attempt bounced {when}. Update the address and resend.

step_7_launch.title: When do you want your first pickup?
step_7_launch.subtitle: We need a minimum 10 calendar-day window to schedule your first pickup.
step_7_launch.earliest_callout: Earliest first pickup: {earliestDate}. We need 10 calendar days to line up the route.
step_7_launch.mode_commit: I know the date I want

fields.not_sure_yet: I'm not sure yet — I'll confirm later
fields.not_sure_subcopy: No problem. We'll check in every 2 weeks. You can come back here anytime to lock it in.

step_7_launch.date_too_soon_error: Your first pickup must be at least 10 calendar days from today ({earliestDate} or later).
step_7_launch.tooltip_disabled_date: We need at least 10 calendar days to schedule your first pickup.
step_7_launch.submit_deferred: Save — I'll confirm the date later
step_7_launch.success_with_date: Request submitted. Your NST rep will confirm within one business day. We'll email {email} as soon as it's locked in.
step_7_launch.success_deferred: Saved. We'll email you every 2 weeks. When you're ready, open the link in any of those emails to pick your date.

activation.title: You're live, {storeName}.
activation.subtitle: First pickup: {date}. We'll email you when the driver is on the way.

before_pickup.title: Before each pickup
before_pickup.body: Enter your deposit in the portal, seal the bag, band your cash.

need_change.title: Need change?
need_change.body: Submit a change order at least 2 business days ahead.

with_date.title: Waiting on launch-date confirmation
with_date.body: Your NST rep will confirm {requestedDate} within one business day. We'll email {email} as soon as it's locked in.

deferred.title: Waiting for you to pick your launch date
deferred.body: We'll check in every 2 weeks. When you're ready, come back here to pick your date.

stuck_detection.banner_48h: Stuck? Reply to your welcome email or text us at {supportNumber} and we'll help.
stuck_detection.support_chat_opened: We opened the support chat for you.

kickoff.subject: You're almost done setting up with NST — 6 quick steps left
kickoff.body:
Hi {firstName},

Your NST service agreement is signed and filed. Thank you.

To finish setting up your account, please complete the steps below. It takes about 15 minutes and is fully self-serve. You'll enter your store details, confirm your safe and bank info, walk through a sample deposit and change order, and pick your first pickup date.

One important thing: we need a minimum 10 calendar-day window to schedule your first pickup, so the earliest date you'll see on the calendar is {earliestDate}.

[Finish my setup →]

If you need to hand this off to someone else in the store, forward this email — the link works for whoever opens it first.

Questions? Reply to this email or text us at {supportNumber}.

— The NST team

reminder_day2.subject: Still need to finish your NST setup
reminder_day2.body:
Hi {firstName},

Quick reminder — your NST setup is waiting on you. About 15 minutes.

[Finish my setup →]

— The NST team

reminder_day5.subject: Your NST setup is still open
reminder_day5.body:
Hi {firstName},

Your NST onboarding is still pending. Let us know if you need help — reply here or text us at {supportNumber}.

[Finish my setup →]

— The NST team

pick_your_date.subject: Ready to pick your first pickup date with NST?
pick_your_date.body:
Hi {firstName},

Quick check-in — do you have a date locked in for your first NST pickup yet?

Remember we need a minimum 10 calendar-day window, so the earliest date is {earliestDate}.

[Pick my launch date →]

We'll check in again in two weeks. No rush.

— The NST team

pick_your_date_final.subject: Last reminder — let's lock in your NST launch date
pick_your_date_final.body:
Hi {firstName},

This is our sixth reminder about your NST launch date. We won't keep emailing — your rep will call you soon.

If you'd rather pick it yourself, the link is still live:

[Pick my launch date →]

— The NST team

launched.subject: You're live with NST
launched.body:
Hi {firstName},

You're officially live. Your first pickup is {firstPickupDate} between {timeWindow}.

Your driver will arrive at {address}.

Before then, three quick reminders:
- Before each pickup: enter your deposit in the portal, seal the bag, band your cash.
- Need change? Submit a request at least 2 business days ahead.
- Something off? Text us at {supportNumber}.

— The NST team
